title: ux-DataGrid
text: ux-DataGrid This section provides description for the logical widget ux-DataGrid properties. ux-DataGrid widget Property Description Logical widget name ux-DataGrid Maps to physical widget Default definition in [webentitywidgets] ux-DataGrid=uxdatagrid Supported triggers None Used for (Non) Database entity enabling the user to view the data of the entity. Related Links uxdatagrid The uxdatagrid is an entity-level widget that shows tabular entity data as a set of rows and columns. The uxdatagrid allows users to quickly and easily look up values that indicate some kind of connection between different types of data, for example name of an employee in an organization and their salary, or a day of the week, or the timetable for a local swimming pool. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
